---
title: Podcasts
---

Ongoing podcasts and individual episodes the school draws on. Podcasts suit adult learners because they fit into commutes, chores, and other time that otherwise cannot be used for study.

> This table is generated automatically from the `resources:` frontmatter on each theme's lens files. Do not edit it by hand — add or change a resource in the relevant lens file and run `npm run resources`.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: resources — edit lens frontmatter, then run `npm run resources` -->

## A note on selection

The school is not in the business of endorsing podcasts wholesale. Many useful podcasts have episodes that miss, and many uneven podcasts have episodes that are excellent. Curate by episode where possible.

## Status

This index is generated from theme content. To add a podcast, add it to the relevant theme lens and re-run the generator. Contributions welcome via pull request.
